questions.clue: Hired to work on this project in 1944, 18-year-old whiz Theodore Hall probably shouldn't have been: he became a Soviet spy

final.clue: In a 1939 letter, he recalled a boyhood experience that inspired his life's work: petting his cat on a cold winter's night
